member.name: M:Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmExceptionExtensions.Log(Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Logs the information of the given alarm into different destinies, such as the Datalog, Console, and the SharedStorage.
member.param: The name of the current instance.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Exceptions.DffExceptionExtensions.LogDffException(Prime.Base.Exceptions.DffException,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Logs the information of the given DFF alarm into the Datalog by ituff Deflate and Console.
member.param: The name of the current instance.
The session context of this operation.
